metadata.title: BufferLine | See how AI changes the way you think, decide, and trust
metadata.description: An open framework for understanding how AI changes the way you think, decide, and share authority. Observation, extraction, and governance — made visible.
metadata.ogTitle: BufferLine | AI changes how you think, decide, and trust. Can you see it?
metadata.ogDescription: An open framework for understanding how AI reshapes human judgment. It doesn't say those changes are good or bad — it just makes them visible.

brand.description: An open framework for understanding how AI changes the way you think, decide, and share authority.
brand.note: Protocol-first today. Platform and product layers follow when evidence is strong.

footer.tagline: See how AI changes the way you think, decide, and trust.
